CustomField.description: Created on Behalf of Incident Number-INC0054070 to identify correct account getting associated to an opportunity.
CustomField.formula: /* First upload a Public Asset Image: App Launcher > Files > go to Libraries> Asset Library > Click Upload Asset File > Make available for all internal and public image. To get the VERSION ID (different than the image ID) in new orgs, or when updating an image, 1.open the image and then right click on the image, 2.choose "Copy Image Link", 3.paste the link in a notepad and copy the Id between "versionId=" amd "&operationContext=" (i.e.: versionId=068290000015Epe&operationContext=...) IF TRUE show Green else show RED. */ IMAGE ("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/download/" & IF(RecordType.DeveloperName="ProspectAccount"||fxSetMergeFlag__c =True,"0684V00000J01wT","0684V00000J01wU") ,"",25,25)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: To identify the correct account getting associated to an opportunity.
CustomField.label: Use With Opportunities
